```python
def solve(nums: list[int], k: int) -> int:
    n = len(nums)
    prefix_sum = [0] * (n + 1)
    for i in range(1, n + 1):
        prefix_sum[i] = prefix_sum[i - 1] + nums[i - 1]
    dp = [0] * (n + 1)
    max_mod = [-float('inf')] * k
    max_mod[0] = 0
    for i in range(1, n + 1):
        current_prefix = prefix_sum[i]
        current_mod = current_prefix % k
        current_candidate = current_prefix + max_mod[current_mod]
        dp[i] = max(dp[i - 1], current_candidate)
        value = dp[i] - current_prefix
        if value > max_mod[current_mod]:
            max_mod[current_mod] = value
    total_sum = prefix_sum[n]
    return total_sum - dp[n]
```

def solve(nums: list[int], k: int) -> int:
    n = len(nums)
    prefix_sum = [0] * (n + 1)
    for i in range(1, n + 1):
        prefix_sum[i] = prefix_sum[i - 1] + nums[i - 1]
    
    dp = [0] * (n + 1)
    max_mod = [float('-inf')] * k
    max_mod[0] = 0
    
    for i in range(1, n + 1):
        current_prefix = prefix_sum[i]
        current_mod = current_prefix % k
        current_candidate = current_prefix + max_mod[current_mod]
        dp[i] = max(dp[i - 1], current_candidate)
        value = dp[i] - current_prefix
        if value > max_mod[current_mod]:
            max_mod[current_mod] = value
    
    total_sum = prefix_sum[n]
    return total_sum - dp[n]
```

def solve(nums: list[int], k: int) -> int:
    n = len(nums)
    prefix_sum = [0] * (n + 1)

    dp = [0] * (n + 1)

        dp[i] = max(dp[i - 1], current_candidate)
        value = dp[i] - current_prefix
        if value > max_mod[current_mod]:

    total_sum = prefix_sum[n]
    return total_sum - dp[n]

def solve(nums: list[int], k: int) -> int:
    n = len(nums)
    prefix_sum = [0] * (n + 1)

        prefix_sum[i] = prefix_sum[i - 1] + nums[i - 1]

    max_mod = [float('-inf')] * k
    max_mod[0] = 0

        current_mod = current_prefix % k
        current_candidate = current_prefix + max_mod[current_mod]
        dp[i] = max(dp[i - 1], current_candidate)
        value = dp[i] - current_prefix
        if value > max_mod[current_mod]:
            max_mod[current_mod] = value
    
    total_sum = prefix_sum[n]
    return total_sum - dp[n]

    const n = nums.length;

    const prefix_sum = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    const dp = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    // Initialize max_mod array

    const max_mod = new Array(k).fill(-Infinity);

    max_mod[0] = 0; // since prefix_sum[0] is 0, dp[0] - prefix_sum[0] is 0 - 0 = 0.

    for (let i = 1; i <= n; i++) {

        const current_prefix = prefix_sum[i];

        const current_mod = current_prefix % k;

        // current_candidate is current_prefix + max_mod[current_mod]

        let current_candidate = current_prefix + max_mod[current_mod];

        dp[i] = Math.max(dp[i-1], current_candidate);

        // Now update max_mod for current_mod

        const value = dp[i] - current_prefix;

        if (value > max_mod[current_mod]) {

            max_mod[current_mod] = value;

        }

    }

    const total_sum = prefix_sum[n];

    return total_sum - dp[n];

}
